exemplar.title: How do we know that current knowledge is an improvement on past knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: How do we know that current knowledge is an improvement on past knowledge?

strengths: Clear identification of three distinct, real-world objects, including full titles and publication details for two of them
Well-developed links between each object and the chosen IA prompt, showing coherent TOK thinking
Use of quantitative and bibliographic evidence (e.g., jazz listener statistics, Dartnell reference) to support key claims
Compelling real-world connection drawn between ancient khipu durability and modern communication technologies
Thoughtful exploration of access to knowledge issues, adding depth to the argument about improvement
weaknesses: Context for the khipu remains imprecise (no provenance, dating or museum details)
Several claims rely on broad assertions rather than precise analysis tied to explicit knowledge questions
Evidence is unevenâsome historical and statistical claims lack full citations
Analysis occasionally drifts into narrative description rather than critical evaluation
Minor stylistic and citation inconsistencies (typos, incomplete bibliography entries)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Given the examinerâs overall mark of 7, the exhibition aligns with the 7â8 band: all three objects are clearly identified with specific real-world contexts (though the khipu details are somewhat generic), and each is linked to the IA prompt with generally clear, well-explained reasoning. The commentary offers a strong justification for each object, supported by a mixture of quantitative data and authoritative references. While some points need more precise evidence and sharper framing as knowledge questions, the submission as a whole demonstrates a cohesive, well-supported TOK exhibition that meets the threshold for a high band score. Consequently, a final holistic score of 7 accurately reflects both the submissionâs strengths and its areas for further refinement.

annotations.comment: The student should refine the interpretation of the IA prompt to define what constitutes âimprovementâ in knowledge, ensuring a sharper focus and guiding the exhibitionâs analysis.
Clear, specific identification of Object 1 with title and exam board adds credibility and context to your exhibition.

This introductory description is largely narrative and lacks explicit connection to the prompt; consider explaining how studying ABRSM pieces concretely shows that current knowledge improves past knowledge.
The claim about the treble clefâs 11th-century origins is interesting but requires a citation. Please reference a reliable source to support this historical assertion.

While noting consistent notation over time, you rely on broad statements about âhigher spectrum of soundsâ; define specific metrics or examples (e.g., frequency ranges) to substantiate how technology has improved intonation.
How might you formulate an explicit knowledge question here to guide your analysis of whether enhanced notation reflects improved musical knowledge?
Inclusion of the 34% statistic on Jazz listeners is a good use of quantitative evidence to support your argument.
Please provide full citation details (author, date, source) for the Jazz listening statistic to enhance the credibility of your evidence.
The title of Object 2 lacks specific provenanceâinclude dating, museum or excavation details to avoid a generic presentation.
Expand on the administrative uses of khipu with concrete examples: what procedures were recorded and how does that context affect your evaluation of improvement?
You cite âapproximately 600â surviving khipuâplease reference the archaeological study or database supporting that figure.
The observation about shifting criteria (durability vs speed) implicitly raises a knowledge questionâmake this explicit to deepen your analysis.
This sentence cuts off abruptly. Clarify the concluding thought about durability and its relevance to the exhibitionâs prompt.
Drawing parallels between khipu durability and modern digital communication is a compelling real-world connection.
The full, formal title of Object 3 is well-presented, providing clarity and context for your third example.
Your anecdote about discovering the novel is engaging, but you should tie this experience back to the prompt to justify its selection.
The discussion of foundational knowledge transcending time is persuasive and well-linked to the promptâs theme.
There is a minor typo (âin is essenceâ); correct such errors to maintain professional academic tone.
Your exploration of access to knowledge highlights an important equity issue, enriching your argument about improvement.
To deepen analysis, explicitly frame your point about unequal access as a knowledge question and link it back to the prompt.
Bibliography section heading is clear, but ensure all entries follow a consistent citation style.
Include access dates for online sources to enhance completeness and allow verification of web references.
The De Veaux reference is incomplete; add publication details and a working URL or DOI.
Citing Dartnellâs book demonstrates engagement with a recognized expert, strengthening your exhibitionâs intellectual foundation.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
